entity.summary: Decentralized exchange suite in the Enosys ecosystem, providing V2 automated-market-maker trading and V3 concentrated-liquidity exchange functions across Flare and Songbird-related deployments.
entity.notes: HEI models Enosys Flare, AMM V2, AMM V3, and V3 Flare discovery rows as one exchange entity. Current first-party site lists DEX V2 and DEX V3 as live products and describes AMM, liquidity, and concentrated-liquidity swap functions.

evidence.title: Enosys official product suite
evidence.notes: First-party site describes the Enosys DeFi suite and lists AMM, liquidity, lending, and bridge components.

evidence.title: Enosys DEX V2 and V3 live products
evidence.notes: Current first-party site lists DEX V2 and DEX V3 as live products, with swap, liquidity, reward, and concentrated-liquidity descriptions and direct application links.

evidence.title: Enosys DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: Secondary DEX registry exposes Enosys AMM V2 and V3 rows; HEI consolidates them with Flare exchange source rows into one entity.
